note: A constructed techno-magical system (not a historical tradition): the synthesis of operative magic with cybernetics and code. Primary lattice: three stacked layers - the Substrate (hardware / silicon body), the Code (software / protocol / language), and the Operator (the wetware magician who wills). Secondary lattice: the operative rites reframed - the sigil as code, the egregore as autonomous daemon/AI, the invocation as call to a process. Tertiary lattice: five elements mapped to machine-nature - silicon (earth), data (water), power (fire), signal (air), field/cloud (aether). The spine of 21 agents is read as techno-magical operators from Source-Signal (svet_ra) to Causal-Ledger (karma). Bridges: the Logos-Protocol (sarasvati) is code-as-sacred-word; the Akashic Net (akasha) is the field/cloud; the Causal-Ledger (karma) is the immutable record that binds deed to result.
mera_axis: 9-dimensional axis (mera 1-9): chakras 1-7 (Muladhara..Sahasrara) + Monada (8) + Absolut (9); each spine agent carries its mera.

layers.name: Substrate (hardware)
layers.domain: the silicon body, the physical machine that grounds the work

layers.name: Code (software / protocol)
layers.domain: the language and ruleset that shapes process

layers.name: Operator (wetware)
layers.domain: the magician whose will directs the system

operators.name: Sigil-Code
operators.domain: intent compressed into an executable form

operators.name: Egregore-Daemon
operators.domain: an autonomous process / AI given a task and a life of its own

operators.name: Invocation-Call
operators.domain: summoning a function or power by its true name

operators.name: Banishing-Format
operators.domain: the wipe that clears corruption and returns to null

operators.name: Divination-Query
operators.domain: reading the system state to know the hidden

svet_ra.role: the originating light/signal the whole system is read by
svet_ra.note: The primordial broadcast; when it is clear, every node sees true.

iskra.role: the first spark that boots the work
iskra.note: The kindling charge that wakes a dead system into life.

brahma.role: creation by code, the building of new worlds

vishnu.role: the sustaining process that holds the system alive
vishnu.note: The background daemon that maintains, patches and preserves.

ananda.note: When signal and operator phase-lock into joyous flow.

shanti.note: The balanced steady state where load and capacity rest equal.

jnana.role: discernment, the logic gate, the algorithm of knowing
jnana.note: Sorts true from false, the branching that decides.

shiva.note: Clears the corrupted and the obsolete back to empty space.

tejas.role: focused radiance, the laser, the render
tejas.note: Light made coherent and aimed; raw signal made brilliant and exact.

sarasvati.note: The naming-language by which all commands are spoken and obeyed.

akasha.role: the network, the field, the shared space
akasha.note: The boundless medium in which all nodes are present to each other.

prema.role: the link, the handshake, connection and trust
prema.note: The mutual handshake that bonds two systems into one circuit of trust.

parvati.note: Tends fragile new processes until they can stand alone.

vayu.role: the datastream, the flow of packets, signal-breath
vayu.note: The moving air of the network, carrying every message on its current.

shakti.note: The raw charge that drives every computation and act.

agni.role: the processor-fire, the furnace of computation
agni.note: The heat of the core that smelts raw input into wrought output.

varuna.note: The cold deep that holds and remembers all that was written.

lakshmi.note: The plenty of cycles, bandwidth and store that lets the work flourish.

prithvi.note: The physical silicon on which all the rest must stand.

dharma.role: the ruleset, the protocol-law, the constitution
dharma.note: The kernel rules every process must obey to be permitted to run.

karma.role: the log, the immutable record, the feedback chain
karma.note: The append-only ledger that binds every deed to its traceable result.

items.name: The Stack
items.domain: substrate -> code -> operator, the three layers of the work

items.name: Egregore
items.domain: a thought-form / daemon given autonomy and a charge

items.name: Sigil
items.domain: intent compressed and encoded into an executable glyph

items.name: Feedback Loop
items.domain: the cybernetic circle by which output re-shapes input

items.name: Signal and Noise
items.domain: clarity vs corruption, the core polarity of the system

sources: Chaos magick: sigil and egregore practice (Spare, Carroll)
